ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "brand_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* Image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "type_image" TEXT /* Image representing the product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Image of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit (SKU) of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Size code (e.g., S, M, L, XL, 2XL) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_chart_image" TEXT /* Image of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the size chart */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the product in the size chart */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size in the size chart */,
  "body_shoulders" REAL /* Measurement for body shoulders */,
  "body_length" REAL /* Measurement for body length */,
  "body_width" REAL /* Measurement for body width */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Measurement for sleeve length */,
  "inseam_length" REAL /* Measurement for inseam length */,
  "waist_circumference" REAL /* Measurement for waist circumference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "location_email" TEXT /* Email address for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the inventory */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product in the inventory */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for reordering the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when threshold is reached */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, warehouse staff, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order containing the item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier (e.g., USPS, UPS, FedEx) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
